reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar, muy buen café, medialunas excelente, quizás la chica que nos atendió estaba cansada porque nos atendió como por obligación y ni ganas de preguntarle algo.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place, very good coffee, excellent croissants, maybe the girl who served us was tired because she served us as if she had to and didn't even feel like asking her anything.
